fundamentals.name: iShares Silver Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The Trust seeks to reflect such performance before payment of the Trust's expenses and liabilities. It is not actively managed. The Trust does not engage in any activities designed to obtain a profit from, or to ameliorate losses caused by, changes in the price of silver.

news.paragraph: Silver prices, tracked by SLV, are facing downward pressure due to weakening demand, according to recent analysis. While SLV has seen significant gains over the past year, concerns about its fees and tax implications have been raised, alongside comparisons to other silver ETFs. The outlook suggests potential headwinds for silver demand, impacting the ETF's performance.

headlines.title: Silver Prices Face Pressure as Demand Weakens (SLV)
SLV Is Up 132% in a Year, But Its 0.50% Fee and 28% Tax Rate Tell a Different Story
Best Silver Stocks for 2026 and How to Invest
SLV: The Largest Silver ETF in the World -- but Is It Still the Best Way to Own Silver in 2026?
SLV vs. SIVR: Same Silver. One Costs You More. Here Is Which Silver ETF Is the Smarter Long-Term Buy.
